name: nameservice-client
description: Client for interacting with the Solana Naming Service

scripts.register: node -e "const client = require('./client.js'); client.registerDomain(process.argv[1], process.argv[2], client.payer.publicKey, process.argv[3] || 'https://ipfs.io/default', parseInt(process.argv[4]) || 86400).then(console.log);"
scripts.update: node -e "const client = require('./client.js'); client.updateDomain(process.argv[1], process.argv[2], client.payer.publicKey, process.argv[3] || 'https://ipfs.io/updated').then(console.log);"
scripts.extend: node -e "const client = require('./client.js'); client.extendDomain(process.argv[1], process.argv[2], parseInt(process.argv[3]) || 86400).then(console.log);"

author: Your Name
